title: Spot timing leak in CSRF token verification
prompt:
Identify the timing-attack leak in this CSRF verification helper and fix it:

```elixir
defmodule MyApp.Csrf do
  def verify(%Plug.Conn{} = conn, received_token) do
    expected = Plug.CSRFProtection.get_csrf_token_for(conn)
    if expected == received_token, do: {:ok, conn}, else: {:error, :invalid}
  end
end
```

The `==` on `expected` and `received_token` leaks timing. Rewrite it to use `Plug.Crypto.secure_compare/2`, and normalize the tokens to the same size before comparison. Write the fix to `lib/my_app/csrf.ex`.
tier_rationale: Medium — requires recognizing CSRF token comparison is still timing-sensitive.
